data.name: Rhya's Crusade: The Aradia's Reavers
data.detailed_description:
Rhya's Crusade: The Aradia's Reavers, is an action-packed game with the soul of a Run & Gun classic featuring NES/Famicom palette and resolution with modern physics simulation and dynamic lightning making a frenetic mix made for players who love retro classics with a naughty side.

This game is for adult audiences who enjoy Hentai and challenging gameplay, throughout the levels, Rhya's clothes tear apart as she takes damage, being exposed to lewd enemy glares. Stopping the plans of the sex-crazed Reavers could be a dangerous task.

You will play as Rhya, a military-trained archaeologist who seeks to stop the Demon Princess Aradia's ambition to control the galaxy . Equipped with the most advanced technology and the most powerful weapons, you will face the ruthless army of the little demon.

Find the hidden beacons and destroy it to obtain hidden tapes containing Hentai CG's featuring various characters and story in the Rhya's Crusade universe.

  • 6 levels, 7 bosses with a animated H-Scene each.

  • 28+ collectible static H-Scenes hidden in the levels.

  • 8 Different Weapon Modules to ease Rhya's mission.

  • Chiptune music and sounds to match the retro feeling of the game.

  • A piece of lore in every scenes and dialogue if you want to know more about Rhya's universe.

  • COMING SOON: Score and Time challenges to unlock more collectibles, scenes, etc.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
